title: Dutch Pet Shelter
description: Custom modpack for VictoriaMoonlight, ShinkoRups, and NoMouseCat. Light modded experience that includes things like Farmer's Delight and Macaw's Furniture.
body:
# Dutch Pet Shelter
Light modded experience primarily used on the private server Dutch Pet Shelter. Opened up to the public for anyone who wants to play the same modpack, and for ease of updating.

## Included Features
- Optimizations for both client and server
- Farmer's Delight (And some addons)
- Macaw's Furniture (And basically all of Macaw's mods)
- Simple Voice Chat (And Audioplayer)
- Many more
